name: Vertex
summary: A Vertex. A Vertex represents the end of an Edge or a point inside a Face.

methods.name: common_edge
methods.summary: The common_edge method is used to find a common edge that is defined by this vertex and another vertex
methods.remarks: The common_edge method is used to find a common edge that is defined by this vertex and another vertex

returns.doc: an Edge object common to both vertices if successful. Returns nil if there is no edge between the two vertices.

methods.name: curve_interior?
methods.summary: Note: This method doesn't actually return a boolean as the question mark post-fix would normally indicate.
methods.remarks: Note: This method doesn't actually return a boolean as the question mark post-fix would normally indicate. But the result still evaluates to truthy or falsy. The #curve_interior? method is used to determine if this vertex is on the interior of a Curve.

methods.name: edges
methods.summary: The edges method is used to retrieve an Array of edges that use the Vertex.
methods.remarks: The edges method is used to retrieve an Array of edges that use the Vertex.

returns.doc: an Array of edge objects if successful

methods.name: faces
methods.summary: The faces method is used to retrieve an Array of faces that use the vertex.
methods.remarks: The faces method is used to retrieve an Array of faces that use the vertex.

returns.doc: an Array of faces that use the vertex if successful

methods.name: loops
methods.summary: The loops method is used to retrieve an Array of loops that use the vertex.
methods.remarks: The loops method is used to retrieve an Array of loops that use the vertex.

returns.doc: an Array of loops that use the vertex if successful

methods.name: position
methods.summary: The position method is used to retrieve the Point3d position of a vertex.
methods.remarks: The position method is used to retrieve the Point3d position of a vertex.

returns.doc: a Point3d object representing the position of the vertex if successful

methods.name: used_by?
methods.summary: The used_by? method is used to determine if the Vertex is used by a given Edge or Face.
methods.remarks: The used_by? method is used to determine if the Vertex is used by a given Edge or Face.

params.name: face_or_edge
params.doc: A Face or Edge ot test against.
